<!-- Generated by the `piqi-redesign-research` workflow (8-lens research -> synthesis -> plan + design-system spec). This is a research/planning artifact: reconcile every recommendation against the locked decisions in CLAUDE.md before implementing. See README.md in this folder. -->

# PIQI Group — Redesign Plan (Award-Tier Elevation, Constraint-Locked)

> Executable plan grounded in the real repo. References actual files: `app/globals.css`, `app/layout.tsx`, `components/sections/Hero.tsx`, `components/global/GroupNav.tsx`, `lib/data/verticals.ts`, etc. No real copy is added — all content stays as-is or becomes lorem placeholders. Every locked constraint in `CLAUDE.md` is respected by default; the few proposed deviations are quarantined under **REQUIRES USER APPROVAL**.

---

## 1. Redesign Thesis — The Signature Feel

PIQI becomes a **layered-light dark editorial system where the red is the only voice raised**. The signature moment is a single branded gesture — a **red→navy→ink curtain wipe on route change** plus a **living `@property`-animated hero overlay angle behind the existing `--overlay` gradient** — executed in pure CSS first, with `feTurbulence` grain killing all banding so every surface reads as material, not flat paint. Everything else is restraint: a strict fluid type/space scale, hairline glass instead of grey boxes, transform-only expo-eased motion, and the accent capped at 2–4 statement uses per page (hero overlay, active pill, oversized red numerals, red left-bars — exactly the motifs already in `globals.css`). The result is Awwwards-SOTD-adjacent craft achieved by perfecting what PIQI already owns, not by bolting on a 3D scene the brand has no assets for.

---

## 2. Phased Rollout

Each phase ends with the **quality gate** (Section 8) green and all **16 routes `○ Static`** (consulting spokes `● SSG`). Phases are independently shippable and independently revertible (Section 8 rollback posture).

### R0 — Design-System Foundation (tokens only, zero visual regressions intended)
- **Goal:** Install the motion + type + color token layer and the grain/glow primitives without changing a single page's structure. Pure additive CSS.
- **Files touched:** `app/globals.css` (top `:root` block + new token sections), `app/layout.tsx` (add one fixed grain overlay element + skip-link already present).
- **Changes:**
  - Extend `:root` with the **motion tokens** (`--ease-out-expo`, `--ease-out-quint`, `--ease-ui`, `--ease-in-out`, `--ease-back`, `--dur-1..5`, `--stagger`, `--reveal-y`) and the **`@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)`** override that collapses all `--dur-*` to `.01ms` and `--reveal-y` to `0`.
  - Add a **fluid type scale** (`--step--1 … --step-4`, `--step-stat`) and **fluid space scale** (`--space-1 … --space-12`, 4→192px) as new tokens. Do **not** yet rewire existing `clamp()` call-sites — that is R1+. Tokens exist, adoption is incremental.
  - Add an **elevation ladder** mapping onto existing names so nothing breaks: keep `--bg`, `--surface`, `--surface-strong` but add `--surface-1/-2/-3` and `--hairline` (`rgba(255,255,255,.08)`) as aliases the new components use.
  - Add `--red-bright: #e23b3f` for small text/links (the existing `--brand #bb181d` is large-text-only for AA).
  - Add a **single grain primitive**: one fixed, `pointer-events:none`, `mix-blend-mode:overlay`, `opacity:.035` element in `app/layout.tsx` rendering an inline SVG `feTurbulence` (`baseFrequency 0.65–0.9`, `numOctaves 3`, `stitchTiles="stitch"`). Sits above background, below content.
  - Add `::selection` (PIQI red), a thin custom scrollbar, and confirm `:focus-visible` (already present at line 763) stays.
  - Set `html { scroll-behavior: smooth }` to honor reduced-motion via a guard (currently unconditional at line 100 — wrap it).
- **Exit criteria:** Build/lint/typecheck/validate-schema pass. Visual diff shows grain + selection color only; no layout shift; all routes `○ Static`; 66+ schemas unchanged.

### R1 — Global Chrome + Homepage
- **Goal:** Elevate `Header`/`GroupNav`/`MobileNav`/`Footer` and rebuild the homepage section flow into the signature editorial rhythm.
- **Files touched:** `components/global/Header.tsx`, `GroupNav.tsx`, `MobileNav.tsx`, `Footer.tsx`, `app/page.tsx`, `components/sections/Hero.tsx`, `GroupFacts.tsx`, `VerticalGrid.tsx`, `globals.css`.
- **Changes:**
  - **Active-nav pill** in `GroupNav.tsx`: add `view-transition-name: nav-pill` on `.group-nav-link-active` so the red pill glides between routes (degrades to instant on unsupported browsers). Slide easing `--dur-3 var(--ease-in-out)`.
  - **Header scroll state** already correct (`is-scrolled` at `scrollY>12`) — keep; just retune the transition to `var(--ease-ui)` and verify transparent-at-top is intact (locked).
  - **Homepage hero**: introduce the `@property --overlay-angle` animated gradient behind `--overlay` (wrapped in `@supports (background: paint())` / `@property` guard; static end-state otherwise). Convert hero `<h1>` to a **clip-path line-reveal** on enter (IntersectionObserver, one-shot, reduced-motion → opacity only).
  - **Section rhythm**: widen `.section` vertical padding toward the 120–200px band via the new space tokens; introduce numbered section indices (`01 — OUR VERTICALS`) as mono eyebrows on homepage section headings.
  - **GroupFacts**: keep oversized red numerals; add a count-up on enter (IntersectionObserver, reduced-motion → static number).
  - **VerticalGrid**: keep the `repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr))` grid but add an **asymmetric broken layout on ≥1100px** (Consulting tile spans 2 cols as the only mini-hub — makes the octopus asymmetry *visible*). Staggered reveal at `--stagger`.
- **Exit criteria:** Quality gate green; homepage LCP image still `priority`; pill transition verified; routes static.

### R2 — Vertical Hubs (6 siblings, identical rhythm)
- **Goal:** Apply the signature hero + scroll-reveal system uniformly across all six hubs via the shared `VerticalHub` component so they read as siblings.
- **Files touched:** `components/sections/VerticalHub.tsx`, `Hero.tsx`, `MediaSplit.tsx`, `FAQ.tsx`, `app/{property,fashion,yachts,auto,coaching}/page.tsx`, `app/consulting/page.tsx` (hero only), `globals.css`.
- **Changes:**
  - Per-vertical scoped accent via `data-vertical` attribute + scoped custom property (already half-present via `vertical.heroImage`). Add `.vertical[data-vertical="…"]` hooks for future per-vertical glow tint (stays red-only).
  - Hero shader-look on a plane → **deferred/approval**; ship the **pure-CSS animated `--overlay` angle** as the no-approval signature on every hero.
  - Scroll-reveal all hub sections (`MediaSplit`, lanes, `engagement-steps`, `FAQ`) via one shared `Reveal` client wrapper (Section 5).
  - Add the **"More from PIQI Group" sibling strip** at the bottom of every hub (lateral-only links to 2–3 sibling verticals + up to group). New `SiblingStrip` section component. Never links down into another vertical's internals.
- **Exit criteria:** All 6 hubs share identical section order; sibling strip present and lateral-only; routes static; schemas intact.

### R3 — Consulting Spokes (the only depth-2 pages)
- **Goal:** Elevate the 5 sub-service pages and make Consulting's mini-hub status visibly distinct.
- **Files touched:** `app/consulting/[service]/page.tsx`, `app/consulting/page.tsx`, `app/consulting/layout.tsx`, `globals.css`, `lib/data/consulting-services.ts` (no copy change — structure only if needed).
- **Changes:**
  - Add a **Consulting-only intra-hub local nav rail** (the 5 sub-services) rendered from `app/consulting/layout.tsx` so it appears on the hub and all 5 spokes — the asymmetry the IA research calls for. No other vertical gets this.
  - Apply reveal system + `feature-grid`/`fel-stages` stagger.
  - Keep `Breadcrumbs` (already global) — they earn their keep only here at depth 2 (`PIQI Group › Consulting › [Service]`), already emitting `BreadcrumbList` JSON-LD.
  - **Consulting flyout** in `GroupNav` (desktop): a flyout under the Consulting nav item exposing the 5 spokes. Only Consulting gets a flyout/caret — childless verticals get none (mirrors the octopus).
- **Exit criteria:** 5 spokes `● SSG`; flyout keyboard-accessible; breadcrumbs + schema intact; gate green.

### R4 — About / Contact + Interactive Polish
- **Goal:** Group-page editorial treatment (abstract motifs only) + the magnetic/cursor/scramble micro-delight tier + the route-transition curtain.
- **Files touched:** `app/about/page.tsx`, `app/contact/page.tsx`, `components/contact-form.tsx`, `components/brand/Motif1-3.tsx`, `components/scramble-text.tsx`, `components/revolver-heading.tsx`, root layout for transitions, `globals.css`.
- **Changes:**
  - **Route-transition curtain**: install `next-view-transitions`, wrap App Router, override `::view-transition-old/new` with a red wipe panel. Verify **no route flips to `ƒ Dynamic`** after install (explicit gate check).
  - **Magnetic buttons** + **custom cursor** (`mix-blend-mode: difference`, pointer-fine only) as opt-in client islands.
  - Repair and repurpose `revolver-heading.tsx` — it currently emits **Tailwind classes** (`text-4xl md:text-6xl`, `text-blue-400`) that do nothing in this no-Tailwind repo, and a `text-blue-400` color that **violates the red-only rule**. Either delete it or rewrite with PIQI classes + scramble (Section 4).
  - About/Contact keep abstract/architectural imagery + `Motif2/Motif3` only (locked).
- **Exit criteria:** Curtain transition works with clean fallback; cursor/magnetic hidden on touch + reduced-motion; revolver-heading no longer ships dead Tailwind/blue; routes static.

### R5 — Performance / A11y Hardening + Self-Host Fonts
- **Goal:** Lock CWV, finish the font migration (currently `@font-face` pulls Montserrat/Hind from `piqigroup.com` — a render-blocking external dependency), and audit a11y.
- **Files touched:** `app/globals.css` (`@font-face` block lines 33–91), `app/layout.tsx` (`next/font/local`), all `next/image` `sizes` audits.
- **Changes:**
  - Replace the three remote `@font-face` blocks with self-hosted `next/font/local` (the `CLAUDE.md` Phase 5 TODO at globals.css line 760). **Font family change requires user approval** (Section 6) — default is to self-host the *current* Montserrat/Hind, not swap families.
  - Audit every `next/image` `sizes` (homepage collage uses `22vw`/`45vw`; verify against real slots) and confirm exactly 1–2 above-fold `priority` images per route.
  - `next/dynamic({ssr:false})` confirm for `lottie-panel`, plus the new cursor/scramble islands.
  - Full reduced-motion + contrast sweep; verify red is never used for small body text (use `--red-bright`).
- **Exit criteria:** LCP < 2.5s / INP < 200ms / CLS < 0.1 targets; no external font fetch; routes static; gate green.

## 3. Page-by-Page Direction (all ~16 routes)

> Hero / layout / signature moment / section flow. All copy stays existing-or-lorem.

**Home — `app/page.tsx`** (group page → abstract/architectural only, locked)
- Hero: keep video hero (`consultants-office.mp4`) with `--overlay`; add the animated `--overlay-angle`. Headline gets clip-path line-reveal. Keep the architectural collage (`COLLAGE_TILES` are abstract — compliant).
- Signature moment: hero overlay angle drift + first-load reveal.
- Flow: Hero → `Motif1` divider → GroupFacts (count-up) → ClientLogos → VerticalGrid (asymmetric, Consulting spans 2) → MediaSplit (about teaser) → UVP → CTABanner. Add numbered section indices.

**About — `app/about/page.tsx`** (group page, abstract only)
- Hero: keep architectural staircase image + `Motif2` accent. Headline line-reveal.
- Signature: `Motif2` parallax drift on scroll (`view()` timeline, reduced-motion static).
- Flow unchanged structurally: Hero → narrow prose → GroupFacts → MediaSplit(reverse) → CTABanner. Add a numbered "operating model" index.

**Contact — `app/contact/page.tsx`** (group page, abstract only)
- Hero: keep glass-facade architectural image. 
- Signature: form field focus glow + sticky `contact-copy` rail; magnetic submit button.
- Flow unchanged: Hero → contact-grid (details + ContactForm in Suspense). Keep `buildLocalBusiness` schema.

**Consulting hub — `app/consulting/page.tsx`** (vertical hub + mini-hub)
- Hero: dark boardroom image + animated overlay.
- Signature: the **5-spoke local nav rail** (from `consulting/layout.tsx`) + IconList stagger.
- Flow: Hero → intro prose → MediaSplit(reverse,accent) → ImageGallery → IconList → 5 `consulting-tile` grid → QuoteBlock → FAQ → CTABanner.

**Property / Fashion / Yachts / Auto / Coaching — `app/{slug}/page.tsx`** (5 sibling hubs via `VerticalHub`)
- Hero: each owns its Unsplash hero + shared `--overlay` (locked rule, already implemented). Animated overlay angle added.
- Signature: per-vertical scoped accent + scroll-reveal cascade; sibling strip at foot.
- Flow (identical across all five): Hero → operatorBrand subline (if any) → MediaSplit(offerings) → lanes → engagement-steps → FAQ → SiblingStrip → CTABanner. **No carets, no nesting** (locked).
- Vertical-specific cue (within red-only): Yachts/Fashion/Auto lean on imagery + type confidence, not a second hue.

**Consulting spokes ×5 — `app/consulting/[service]/page.tsx`** (depth-2, `● SSG`)
- Hero: service hero image + overlay.
- Signature: FEL-stage reveal + local nav rail showing current spoke active; breadcrumbs.
- Flow: Hero → MediaSplit (alternating reverse by `order`) → feature-grid → fel-stages (where present) → FAQ → back-link → CTABanner. `buildService` + `buildWebPage` schema unchanged.

**Privacy / Terms — `app/privacy/page.tsx`, `app/terms/page.tsx`** (legal)
- Hero: none — narrow `Container` editorial column. Keep `Legal` eyebrow + `<h1>`.
- Signature: none (deliberate restraint). Apply type scale + rhythm only.
- Content stays the existing placeholder + Phase-5 TODO.

**not-found — `app/not-found.tsx`**
- Editorial 404 with red oversized "404" numeral, single CTA back home. Abstract only.

## 4. Component-by-Component Direction

- **Header (`Header.tsx`)** — keep fixed + transparent-at-top + solid-glass-scrolled (locked). Retune transitions to motion tokens. No structural change.
- **GroupNav (`GroupNav.tsx`)** — add `view-transition-name` to active pill for glide; add **Consulting-only flyout** (the single mini-hub) exposing 5 spokes; no caret/flyout on the 5 childless verticals (mirrors octopus). Keep `aria-current`.
- **MobileNav (`MobileNav.tsx`)** — solid. Add reveal/stagger to the panel list; keep `inert` + Escape + focus management. Optionally nest Consulting's 5 spokes under a disclosure.
- **Hero (`Hero.tsx`)** — add animated `--overlay-angle`; headline clip-path line-reveal slot; keep `priority` on full-bleed image and the video/image/overlay structure (the signature `--overlay` is locked). 
- **VerticalGrid (`VerticalGrid.tsx`)** — asymmetric grid (Consulting 2-col span ≥1100px); staggered reveal; keep red overlay tiles.
- **VerticalHub (`VerticalHub.tsx`)** — wrap each section in `Reveal`; append `SiblingStrip`; keep identical section order across all six for sibling cohesion.
- **UVP (`UVP.tsx`)** — keep card grid; add hover red-glow (already present) + reveal stagger. Default copy stays.
- **CTABanner (`CTABanner.tsx`)** — keep radial-red statement backdrop + left red bar; magnetic primary button. Defaults stay.
- **GroupFacts (`GroupFacts.tsx`)** — oversized red numerals (already there) + count-up on enter; `Motif3` backdrop kept.
- **ClientLogos (`ClientLogos.tsx`)** — grayscale→color hover (present); optional slow marquee (reduced-motion → static row). **No fabricated logos** — placeholder/abstract marks only.
- **Footer (`Footer.tsx`)** — confirm it renders the **full sitemap** (6 verticals + 5 consulting spokes nested under Consulting + group/legal from `FOOTER_LINKS`). If spokes aren't listed, add them (makes octopus legible without mega-menu). Red link-hover kept.
- **Button (`Button.tsx`)** — keep polymorphic link/button. Add `--ease-ui` timing + optional `data-magnetic` hook consumed by the cursor island. No API break.
- **Card / Container / SectionHeading (`ui/`)** — adopt hairline + elevation tokens; subgrid-align card internals (eyebrow/title/body/CTA) across rows where supported (`@supports`).
- **Breadcrumbs (`Breadcrumbs.tsx`)** — keep; depth-2 (consulting spokes) is where they matter; schema kept.
- **Motifs (`Motif1-3.tsx`)** — keep as group-page-only abstract decoration (locked). Add `view()`-timeline parallax drift (reduced-motion off). No vertical imagery ever.
- **scramble-text (`scramble-text.tsx`)** — gate behind IntersectionObserver (fire once) + reduced-motion (render final text immediately). Currently runs on mount unconditionally — fix.
- **revolver-heading (`revolver-heading.tsx`)** — **broken in this stack**: emits Tailwind classes that don't exist here and `text-blue-400` (violates red-only). Either remove it or rewrite to PIQI classes with red/white words only. Flag in plan; do not ship blue.
- **lottie-panel (`lottie-panel.tsx`)** — already `dynamic(ssr:false)` with graceful fallback. Keep; ensure it's below-fold + IntersectionObserver-gated mount.

---

## 5. New Interactive Systems (tiered, plain-CSS-first)

**Tier L — Low effort, apply broadly (no approval, ~0–5KB):**
- **Scroll reveals** — one shared `Reveal` client wrapper using **IntersectionObserver** (fire-once) toggling a class that animates `opacity` + `translateY(var(--reveal-y))` with `--ease-out-expo`. Where supported, prefer **native CSS `animation-timeline: view()`** wrapped in `@supports (animation-timeline: view())`; non-supporting browsers (Safari) show static end-state. Reduced-motion → no transform. **Degradation:** content visible regardless.
- **`feTurbulence` grain + single red radial bloom** — pure CSS/SVG, no JS. Always present, no degradation needed.
- **Animated `--overlay-angle`** via `@property` — wrapped in `@supports`; static gradient fallback. Reduced-motion → paused.
- **Custom cursor + magnetic buttons** — small client island, JS lerp, `mix-blend-mode: difference`. Mounted only when `matchMedia('(pointer: fine)')` and not reduced-motion. **Degradation:** native cursor, normal buttons.
- **Custom `::selection`, scrollbar, focus-visible** — pure CSS.

**Tier M — Medium effort, justified JS (call-outs):**
- **Smooth scroll — Lenis (~3KB)** — single client provider, one RAF loop. **Disable under reduced-motion and on `pointer: coarse`/touch.** *Justification:* highest "award feel ÷ cost"; the one library worth adopting. Native `scroll-behavior: smooth` stays as the no-JS fallback.
- **Route transition — `next-view-transitions`** — wraps App Router for SPA-style View Transitions; override `::view-transition-old/new` with the red wipe. **Must verify all 16 routes remain `○ Static` post-install** (gate). **Degradation:** instant navigation on unsupported browsers. Do **not** use the MPA `@view-transition { navigation: auto }` at-rule (Chrome-only, fights `<Link>`).
- **First-visit preloader** — red curtain + 0→100 counter + logo mask, **sessionStorage-gated** (shows once). Pure CSS/JS island. Reduced-motion → instant dismiss. *Optional — can defer.*

**Tier H — High effort (DEFERRED, see Section 6):**
- Any WebGL/Three.js/R3F hero, GPGPU particle field, or canvas fragment-shader hero. **Not in this plan's default path.** The pure-CSS animated gradient mesh achieves the signature without the bundle/SSG risk.

All JS islands are `'use client'`, `next/dynamic`-split where below-fold, and gated so the **server-rendered static HTML is never blank** and **no page/layout calls a request-time primitive**.

---

## 6. Locked Constraints — Handling + REQUIRES USER APPROVAL

**Respected by default (no deviation):** dark-theme-only (no `[data-theme="light"]`/toggle); PIQI red as editorial statement only; fixed transparent→glass header with `Main { padding-top: var(--header-height) }` and full-bleed negative-margin cancel; favicon via `app/icon.png`; **never mix vertical imagery on group pages** (Home/About/Contact stay abstract/architectural + motifs); each vertical owns its hero + red overlay; octopus IA with **no nesting** and **no carets on childless verticals**; plain CSS in `globals.css` (no Tailwind, no CSS-in-JS, no per-component modules); all 16 routes `○ Static`; 66+ schemas; no emoji; brand strings from `lib/constants.ts`; vertical copy from `lib/data/`.

**REQUIRES USER APPROVAL (deviations / material additions):**
1. **Any WebGL/Three.js/R3F/GPGPU/canvas-shader hero** — adds 150–600KB+, needs a poster fallback, must be `dynamic(ssr:false)` to avoid `ƒ Dynamic`. *Rationale to decline by default:* wrong cost/benefit for a 16-page umbrella; the CSS gradient + grain achieves the look. If approved: single island on Home/About only, server-rendered poster, paused offscreen, disabled on low-power, **all 16 routes must still show `○ Static`**.
2. **A lightweight canvas/OGL fragment-shader behind the red gradient** — new dep + client island. *Rationale:* try the no-approval pure-CSS `@property` mesh first; only escalate if visibly insufficient.
3. **Changing the typeface family** in R5 (e.g., to Bricolage Grotesque) — brand decision. *Default:* self-host the *current* Montserrat + Hind via `next/font/local`, no family swap.
4. **Any second hue** (gold on yachts, neon mesh, the existing `text-blue-400` in `revolver-heading.tsx`) — violates red-only. *Default:* red is the only accent; the blue in revolver-heading is removed, not kept.
5. **UI sound design / mute toggle** — low ROI, new persistent global control.
6. **Adding the first-visit preloader** as a permanent feature — minor, but it's a new blocking-feel surface; confirm before shipping.

---

## 7. No-Real-Copy Handling

- **Existing copy stays** wherever it already lives (`lib/data/verticals.ts`, `consulting-services.ts`, `faqs.ts`, page-level prose, `lib/constants.ts`). The redesign is presentational + structural — **no new factual claims**, no team names, testimonials, vessel/pricing, or addresses beyond the PO box.
- **New slots get lorem placeholders**, never invented facts. Any genuinely missing content becomes a `TODO`/`TBD` in-file and a row in `planner/MASTER-PLAN.md` Dependencies (per `CLAUDE.md`).
- **Schema/SEO safety:** JSON-LD builders (`buildOrganization`, `buildWebPage`, `buildService`, `buildBreadcrumbs`, FAQ/Review builders) draw from `lib/constants.ts` + `lib/data/` — **lorem in a visual slot must not flow into a schema field**. Rule: placeholder text lives only in presentational props; schema-bound fields (titles, descriptions, FAQ Q&A, service names) keep real existing strings or stay omitted rather than lorem. `metadata` titles/descriptions stay real. This keeps the **66-schemas-across-16-routes** validator green and avoids shipping lorem into `<meta>`/structured data.
- The `revolver-heading` word list (`Success/Growth/Impact/PIQI`) and `ClientLogos` are placeholder-only — no fabricated client identities.

---

## 8. Risks, Quality Gates, Rollback

**Quality gate (run after every phase, all four must pass):**
```bash
npm run build
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm run validate-schema
```
- All **16 routes `○ Static`** (consulting spokes `● SSG`). Any flip to `ƒ Dynamic` = regression → fix root cause (a page/layout pulled `cookies()`/`headers()`/`searchParams`/`force-dynamic`; keep request-time work in `app/api/contact/route.ts`).
- **`validate-schema` reports ≥66 schemas across 16 routes.**

**Top risks + mitigations:**
- *View-Transitions / Lenis flipping a route dynamic* → install behind a client island, re-run build immediately, gate on the static check. **Highest-watch item.**
- *Scroll-driven CSS unsupported in Safari* → every `animation-timeline`/`@property` block wrapped in `@supports`; static end-state is the fallback (content always visible).
- *Reduced-motion regressions* → the R0 token override + per-island `matchMedia` guard; manual reduced-motion pass in R5.
- *Contrast* → red is large-text-only; `--red-bright` for small/links; AA sweep in R5.
- *CLS from fonts (R5)* → `next/font/local` metric overrides; `font-display: optional`; kill the external `piqigroup.com` `@font-face` fetch.
- *Dead Tailwind in `revolver-heading`* → remove or rewrite; never ship blue.

**Rollback posture:** Each phase is a discrete branch off `dev`, committed in logical units (`CLAUDE.md` discipline), merged only after a green gate + spot-check (build rerun, changed files verified, photo IDs real, pill + transparent header + static gen intact). Tokens (R0) and components are additive/aliased so a phase revert is a clean `git revert` of its commits without cross-phase entanglement. Destructive git ops require explicit per-instance user approval (never batched).

---

## 9. Key Codebase-Grounded Callouts

For the engineer: `app/globals.css` already carries most red-editorial motifs (lines 1331+) so R0 is additive; `components/revolver-heading.tsx` ships dead Tailwind + a red-rule-violating `text-blue-400` and must be fixed or removed; the `@font-face` blocks (globals.css 33–91) fetch from `piqigroup.com` and are the R5 self-host target; `scramble-text.tsx` runs on mount unconditionally (needs IO + reduced-motion gating); and the View-Transitions/Lenis installs in R2/R4 are the highest-watch items for the `○ Static` gate.
